summary: Botanical Canvas portfolio MVP verified end-to-end. Backend /api/ and /api/chat/stream both return 200 with correct content and SSE format. Frontend renders all sections (Hero, About, Projects x5, Skills, Playground, Contact) with correct data-testids. Nav smooth scroll works, playground drag+reset works, mailto link correct, chatbot opens/streams a real LLM response/closes. LLM budget note in request was outdated — endpoint actually returns full assistant response, no [ERROR] observed.
passed: Home loads with brand 'Botanical/Canvas' and sticky main-nav
Hero heading 'Cultivating digital experiences that bloom.' + both CTAs visible
Playground: item-1 drag moves it >20px; reset restores original position
Contact mailto href = 'mailto:hello@yourname.design?subject=Hello from your portfolio'
Chatbot trigger opens panel; send Enter streams assistant reply; close button hides panel
No console errors on initial load

failed.issue: Emergent 'Made with Emergent' badge (#emergent-badge) overlaps the chatbot-trigger button in the bottom-right corner and intercepts pointer events, blocking normal clicks on the Critique AI button.
failed.evidence: Playwright click on [data-testid="chatbot-trigger"] failed with '<a id="emergent-badge"> intercepts pointer events'. Force-click succeeded and chat worked normally afterwards.

action_items: Consider nudging the chatbot-trigger button up/left (e.g., bottom-20 or right-24 on md+) or lowering its z-index conflict so the Emergent badge does not overlay it in the preview environment. This is a real user-facing overlap in the bottom-right corner.
notes: Emergent LLM key currently has budget — /api/chat/stream returns a real Claude response, not the expected [ERROR]. Frontend handles the successful stream correctly.
